title: Package Guard Package Snapshot
description: Schema for pi-pkg-guard snapshot files containing npm global package inventory

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON schema. Accepts any pi-pkg-guard version tag or main branch.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the snapshot was created

npmPackages.description: List of pi-related packages installed globally via npm (candidates for pi registration)

items.description: Package name (detected via pi- prefix or pi-coding-agent keyword)

excludedPackages.description: Optional list of packages to exclude from registration prompts

items.description: Package name to exclude from registration
